name: Ryden
skillDescription: Releases a robotic spider that travels in a straight line for 10s. The spider will pounce on the first enemy it encounters within 5m, reducing their movement speed by 80% and dealing 10 damage/s for 3s.
lore: Ryden is a 16-year-old inventive genius. He loves tinkering with gadgets and has created a robotic spider to help him in battle.
